mapper.sql: ${regAdminUserAlias:regAdminUser}.admin_id AS ${regAdminUserAlias:regAdminUser}_id, ${regAdminUserAlias:regAdminUser}.admin_nm AS ${regAdminUserAlias:regAdminUser}_nm, ${regFormUserAlias:regFormUser}.user_id AS ${regFormUserAlias:regFormUser}_id, ${regFormUserAlias:regFormUser}.user_nm AS ${regFormUserAlias:regFormUser}_nm, ${auditTable}.cret_id, ${auditTable}.cret_dt, ${auditTable}.cret_ip, ${modAdminUserAlias:modAdminUser}.admin_id AS ${modAdminUserAlias:modAdminUser}_id, ${modAdminUserAlias:modAdminUser}.admin_nm AS ${modAdminUserAlias:modAdminUser}_nm, ${modFormUserAlias:modFormUser}.user_id AS ${modFormUserAlias:modFormUser}_id, ${modFormUserAlias:modFormUser}.user_nm AS ${modFormUserAlias:modFormUser}_nm, ${auditTable}.amd_id, ${auditTable}.amd_dt, ${auditTable}.amd_ip
